name: Mini Apple Pizzas
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat biscuits into 3-1/2 inch circles and place on a lightly greased baking sheet.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine brown sugar, flour, and cinnamon; mix well.
3. Add apples and mix well.
4. Spoon rounded tablespoonfuls of the mixture onto the biscuits.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 - 20 minutes or until edges begin to brown.
6. If desired, sprinkle each pizza with 1 tablespoon cheese.
7. Serve warm.
